name: Security Audit

extras.text: Has the change been reviewed for injection, XSS, CSRF, and auth bypass?
What security boundaries must NOT be crossed?

specSections.title: Security Review
specSections.placeholder: _Summarize the security review: injection (SQL/XSS/command), auth bypass, CSRF, hardcoded secrets, missing input validation. File:line reference for each finding. CRITICAL findings block merge._

DISCOVERY: For any auth or session question, ask about token storage, expiry, rotation, and revocation — all four.
For any input that crosses a trust boundary, ask about validation and sanitization strategy.
Surface threat-model implications proactively — do not wait for the user to ask.

reminders: Check for hardcoded secrets, unsanitized input, and missing auth checks
acceptanceCriteria: Auth checks present on protected routes
